[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Grai'tvo''' was the shields officer on the ''[[Ralroost]]''. He was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] with cream-colored fur.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
